message:
style(macros): apply rustfmt 2024 import ordering to proc-macro crate

Reorder `use` items in all asupersync-macros source files to comply with
the Rust 2024 edition's import ordering convention: type/value imports
(uppercase identifiers) are now sorted lexicographically alongside path
imports, and macro re-exports come last.

Affected files: join.rs, race.rs, scope.rs, session.rs, spawn.rs, util.rs

No functional changes — purely mechanical rustfmt reformatting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
